Levels.ses-screening: Tabular phenotypic data collection screening session for subject diagnosis.
Levels.ses-pre: Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) session prior to Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) treatment. Baseline session for Healthy Volunteer subjects.
Levels.ses-cbt03: Tabular phenotypic data collection session after 3 weeks of Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT).
Levels.ses-cbt08: Tabular phenotypic data collection session after 8 weeks of Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT).
Levels.ses-cbt12: Tabular phenotypic data collection session after 12 weeks of Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT).
Levels.ses-post: Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) session after Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) treatment for Anxiety group. Second MRI session for Healthy Volunteer subjects.

age.Description: Participant age at time of session.
